description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved brentuximab vedotin in combination with ESHAP (etoposide, cisplatin, and cytarabine) (BRESHAP) for reimbursement as a treatment option for the treatment of adult patients with relapsed/refractory CD30+ Hodgkin's lymphoma.

contributions.description: Adding HSE approvals for reimbursement to database

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute

reportedIn.name: Brentuximab vedotin, Etoposide, methylPREDNISolone, Cytarabine and CISplatin, (ESHAP) therapy (BRESHAP). NCCP National SACT Regimen. HSE.
